ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry in the demographics table */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the age group */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population (e.g., male, female) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the specified age group */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Actual population count for the specified age group and year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data (e.g., UN, World Bank, national statistics office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demography_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code representing the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country for the latest year available */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., Total 5-9 years) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Specific age range (e.g., 5-9, 10-14) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for the demographic statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "demography_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic statistic being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used to access the data */,
  "data_exported" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the data was exported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demography_id FOREIGN KEY ("demography_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demography_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection */,
  "demography_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic statistic referenced */,
  "projected_year" INTEGER /* Year for the projected data */,
  "projected_percentage" REAL /* Projected percentage of the population in the specified age group */,
  "projection_method" TEXT /* Method used for the projection (e.g., linear regression, exponential growth) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the projection */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the projection data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_demography_id FOREIGN KEY ("demography_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demography_id")
)
